screen.mappywall.tasks.title: MappyWall Jobs
screen.mappywall.tasks.empty: No jobs in this world and dimension.
screen.mappywall.config.title: MappyWall Setup
screen.mappywall.automation_style_toolti: Normal mode mimics view/key input; aggressive mode sends server-facing rotation and directly drives velocity/interactions, which may trigger anti-cheat.
screen.mappywall.auto_locked: Automatic modes are planned after the manual MVP.
screen.mappywall.auto_walk_note: Automatic modes control movement/items; press K to stop.
screen.mappywall.scale_note: Note: empty maps open at vanilla scale 0; craft/zoom them afterward.
hud.mappywall.pause_hint: Press U to pause/resume, M for jobs
hud.mappywall.open_anywhere_in_region: Open the map anywhere inside the target region
hud.mappywall.scale_needs_existing_map: Empty maps open at scale 0; craft/zoom them afterward
hud.mappywall.scale_empty_maps_open_as_z: MappyWall will open a scale 0 map; craft/zoom it to the target scale afterward
hud.mappywall.auto_walk_active: Auto walk enabled; press K to stop
hud.mappywall.auto_elytra_active: Elytra + fireworks enabled; press K to stop
hud.mappywall.aggressive_active: Aggressive mode: player facing/velocity are controlled
message.mappywall.stopped: MappyWall job stopped and HUD hidden.
message.mappywall.project_inactive: This job is complete and cannot be activated.
message.mappywall.order_empty: This MappyWall job does not have any map bindings to print yet.
message.mappywall.needs_empty_map: MappyWall needs an empty map for column %s, row %s.
message.mappywall.scale_requires_existin: Heads up: vanilla empty maps open at scale 0. Craft/zoom them afterward.
message.mappywall.scale_empty_maps_open_: Heads up: vanilla empty maps open at scale 0; MappyWall will bind this wall cell and you can craft/zoom it to the target scale afterward.
message.mappywall.open_unverified: MappyWall tried to open a map but could not reliably identify the new map id, so it paused to avoid consuming more empty maps.
message.mappywall.auto_walk_enabled: AUTO_WALK enabled: MappyWall will control forward movement. Press K to stop.
message.mappywall.auto_walk_aggressive_e: Aggressive auto walk enabled: MappyWall sends server-facing rotation and directly drives velocity. Press K to stop.
message.mappywall.auto_elytra_enabled: Elytra + fireworks enabled: MappyWall will steer flight and use fireworks. Press K to stop.
message.mappywall.auto_elytra_aggressive: Aggressive Elytra + fireworks enabled: MappyWall sends server-facing rotation, corrects velocity, and uses fireworks. Press K to stop.
message.mappywall.auto_elytra_no_elytra: Elytra + fireworks mode requires Elytra equipped in the chest slot. Paused.
message.mappywall.auto_elytra_no_firewor: Elytra + fireworks mode requires firework rockets. Paused.
message.mappywall.auto_elytra_no_launch_: This position does not have enough Elytra launch/climb space. Paused.
message.mappywall.auto_walk_stuck: AUTO_WALK detected a collision or stalled movement and paused.
message.mappywall.auto_walk_no_path: AUTO_WALK could not find a complete path and is trying local recovery.
message.mappywall.auto_walk_no_place_blo: AUTO_WALK needs to bridge, but no allowed block is available. Cobblestone and dirt are allowed by default.
message.mappywall.auto_walk_too_many_bre: AUTO_WALK has mined 9 blocks for this target and paused to avoid tunneling into terrain.
message.mappywall.fill_requires_zoomed_m: Fill-current-map needs a map zoomed to scale %s. Zoom it in a cartography table, then resume.
message.mappywall.auto_zoom_open_cartogr: Aggressive auto-zoom needs an open cartography table and paper. Target scale: %s.
message.mappywall.auto_zoom_no_paper: Aggressive auto-zoom needs paper, but none was found in the table or inventory.
message.mappywall.auto_zoom_no_bound_map: Aggressive auto-zoom could not find the map bound to the current wall cell.
message.mappywall.emergency_stop: MappyWall emergency-stopped and paused the job.
message.mappywall.auto_disabled: Automatic movement is disabled in this MVP.
